alkylation reagent: carboxymethylated with 0.5 mg/ml of iodoacetamide for 30 min at 37°C
enrichment method: pulled down from these reaction mixtures using Ni2+ magnetic beads
fragmentation method: the collision event was carried out in A- high energy collision cell (HCD Collision Energy of 30%)
instrument: nanospray ionization experiments were performed using a Orbitrap fusion Lumos hybrid mass spectrometer
labeling: mass spectrometry experiments to identify chemical modifications
